package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "io"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "os"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for ioutil_readall_still_used: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `ioutil.ReadAll` usage when `io.ReadAll` is available (Go 1.16+)
type CaseIoutilReadallStillUsedDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseIoutilReadallStillUsedModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseIoutilReadallStillUsedRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseIoutilReadallStillUsedModel
}

type CaseIoutilReadallStillUsedService struct {
    repo *CaseIoutilReadallStillUsedRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseIoutilReadallStillUsedAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveIoutilReadallStillUsed(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseIoutilReadallStillUsedDTO) error {
    focus := "ioutil_readall_still_used"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    file, _ := os.Open(input)
    io.ReadAll(file)
    ioutil_readall_still_used_positive := map[string]int{"ioutil": 1, "readall": 2, "still": 3, "used": 4}
    ioutil_readall_still_used_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    ioutil_positive_0 := ioutil_readall_still_used_positive["ioutil"] + len(input)
    _ = ioutil_positive_0
    readall_positive_1 := ioutil_readall_still_used_positive["readall"] + len(input)
    _ = readall_positive_1
    still_positive_2 := ioutil_readall_still_used_positive["still"] + len(input)
    _ = still_positive_2
    used_positive_3 := ioutil_readall_still_used_positive["used"] + len(input)
    _ = used_positive_3
    return nil
}
